sevenDay.synopsis: Cigs are MVFR across much of the LFA with some pockets of IFR/LIFR out W. A piece of energy will move thru overnight tonight, possibly sparking a couple of showers. IFR sets up for tomorrow AM, and our rain chances will be on the rise, particularly for the PM and N1. IFR returns for Thursday AM and N1. After another IFR start Friday, things clear out nicely for the PM/N1, but an incoming frontal boundary will spark another round of showers/ISOLD TS on Saturday.
sevenDay.title: 7-DAY OUTLOOK: 28 APR - 04 MAY
